ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the stock is delisted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the prices */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that day */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for stock splits */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price before the market opens */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* Price after the market closes */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Any additional fees associated with the transaction */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., market cap, price-weighted) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index at inception */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User-specific notes about the stock in the watchlist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the watchlist entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert setting */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "is_breaking" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the news is breaking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for the preference setting */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value for the preference setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was set */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
